The most comprehensive platform for discovering kids’ events in Geneva, Lausanne, and across the French border!

Filter, explore… and instantly locate everything happening near you.

Featured Activities This Week

Find your favorite activities in our calendar

About Léman Events

Who we are

Léman Events is the go-to platform for all family-friendly events and activities for children aged 0 to 12.

📍 Geneva, Versoix, Coppet, Nyon, Gland, Rolle, Morges, Lausanne, and nearby France (Ferney-Voltaire, Gex, Saint-Julien-en-Genevois, Gaillard, Annemasse, Ville-la-Grand)

The platform also features recommended school holiday camps and must-visit spots for families throughout the year.

Your perfect guide to fun activities with the kids!

Read our story

Why subscribe?

🧭 The most comprehensive calendar of kids’ activities in the region (on average, 60 free and paid events happening in the next two weeks, selected from 150 sources). 🎨 Smart filters (age, date, location, category) to quickly find exactly what you’re looking for. 🗺️ An interactive map to see all nearby events at a glance. ✅ No ads—smooth and enjoyable browsing. 💌 Personalized recommendations, updated regularly. 🌈 Exclusive ideas for outings, workshops, and holiday camps. 💬 A vibrant local network of active, inquisitive parents.

How does it work?

1️⃣ Start your 14-day free trial and get instant access to all kids’ events, camps, and family-friendly locations. 2️⃣ Keep exploring for just CHF 4.90/month–cancel anytime, or choose CHF 49.90/year (2 months free!) and never miss a moment of fun!

Testimonials

Je ne perds plus des heures à chercher quoi faire le week-end ! Tout est là.

Sophie

Maman de 3 enfants (3, 6 et 8 ans) à Lausanne

It has been wonderful to discover all the events for children in the lake Geneva region. My family has a different plan every weekend, and what I like the most is that everything is classified, including the age and the cost of the activity, which makes choosing events easier. Definitely a must-have for parents in Geneva and surroundings.

Alejandra

Mother of a 3-year-old boy

Grâce à Léman Events, on découvre des activités qu’on n’aurait jamais trouvées.

Papa à Ferney
